title: my very first ytpmv
description: I was on my old computer, and I found a video I had made in early 2009. It was my first ytpmv and is a masterpiece in my opinion. Sadly when I put this on youtube (on an account I no longer used) it received absolutely no comments or ratings which is why i decided to reup it. I mean why deprive you of such a godly piece of modern music. A medly if you will of class and culture. It did receive fifty views but what can I say, can't a cook enjoy his own food? This work of art was made in windows movie maker and it took me nearly 3 days to finish. I hope you like it MAI BOI (xd) and pls comnt rat n sup
